parameters.query:
INSERT INTO sessions (
  session_id,
  customer_id,
  session_number,
  customer_company,
  provider_company,
  contract_type,
  status,
  is_training,
  notes,
  customer_leverage,
  provider_leverage,
  leverage_tracker_customer,
  leverage_tracker_provider,
  created_at,
  updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.sessionId }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.userId }}'::uuid,
  'TRN-' || LPAD(FLOOR(RANDOM() * 10000)::text, 4, '0'),
  $cn${{ $json.companyName }}$cn$,
  $ac${{ $json.aiCompanyName }}$ac$,
  'Playbook Training',
  'initiated',
  true,
  $nt$Training scenario: {{ $json.playbookName }} | AI: {{ $json.aiPersonality }} | Opponent: {{ $json.characterName }} | Mode: {{ $json.trainingMode }} | Focus: {{ $json.focusArea }}$nt$,
  {{ $json.baseLeverageCustomer }},
  {{ $json.baseLeverageProvider }},
  {{ $json.baseLeverageCustomer }},
  {{ $json.baseLeverageProvider }},
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING session_id;

INSERT INTO playbook_training_sessions (
  session_id,
  playbook_id,
  user_id,
  training_mode,
  focus_area,
  show_guidance,
  show_hints,
  allow_deviations,
  ai_challenge_level,
  ai_target_red_lines,
  started_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.sessionId }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.playbookId }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.userId }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.trainingMode }}',
  '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.focusArea }}',
  {{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.showGuidance }},
  {{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.showHints }},
  {{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.allowDeviations }},
  CASE 
    WHEN '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.aiPersonality }}' = 'cooperative' THEN 3
    WHEN '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.aiPersonality }}' = 'aggressive' THEN 8
    ELSE 5
  END,
  true,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO provider_bids (
  bid_id,
  session_id,
  provider_id,
  provider_company,
  provider_contact_name,
  provider_contact_email,
  status,
  intake_complete,
  questionnaire_complete,
  invited_at,
  created_at,
  updated_at
) VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid(),
  '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.sessionId }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.aiProviderId }}'::uuid,
  $pc${{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.aiCompanyName }}$pc$,
  $pn${{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.characterName }}$pn$,
  'ai-training@clarence.ai',
  'submitted',
  true,
  true,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING bid_id;

SELECT 
  pr.rule_id,
  pr.clause_id,
  pr.clause_code,
  pr.clause_name,
  pr.category,
  pr.ideal_position,
  pr.minimum_position,
  pr.maximum_position,
  pr.fallback_position,
  pr.rationale,
  pr.negotiation_tips,
  pr.escalation_trigger,
  pr.escalation_contact,
  pr.importance_level,
  pr.is_deal_breaker,
  pr.is_non_negotiable,
  pr.display_order
FROM playbook_rules pr
WHERE pr.playbook_id = '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.playbookId }}'::uuid
  AND pr.is_active = true
  AND (
    '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.focusArea }}' = 'all'
    OR (
      '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.focusArea }}' = 'liability'
      AND (LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%liability%' OR LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%indemnit%')
    )
    OR (
      '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.focusArea }}' = 'payment'
      AND (LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%payment%' OR LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%charge%')
    )
    OR (
      '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.focusArea }}' = 'termination'
      AND (LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%terminat%' OR LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%term %')
    )
    OR (
      '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.focusArea }}' = 'data'
      AND (LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%data%' OR LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%privacy%' OR LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%security%')
    )
    OR (
      '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.focusArea }}' = 'service'
      AND (LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%service%' OR LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%performance%' OR LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%sla%')
    )
    OR (
      '{{ $('Setup & Config').item.json.focusArea }}' = 'ip'
      AND (LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%intellectual%' OR LOWER(pr.category) LIKE '%ip%')
    )
  )
ORDER BY pr.display_order, pr.category, pr.clause_name;

INSERT INTO session_clause_positions (
  position_id,
  session_id,
  clause_id,
  bid_id,
  provider_id,
  clause_number,
  display_order,
  clause_level,
  customer_position,
  provider_position,
  original_customer_position,
  original_provider_position,
  ai_suggested_compromise,
  gap_size,
  customer_weight,
  provider_weight,
  is_deal_breaker_customer,
  is_deal_breaker_provider,
  clause_content,
  status,
  is_applicable,
  is_removed,
  is_locked,
  selected_by_customer,
  source_type,
  source_master_clause_id,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
SELECT 
  (value->>'position_id')::uuid,
  (value->>'session_id')::uuid,
  (value->>'clause_id')::uuid,
  (value->>'bid_id')::uuid,
  (value->>'provider_id')::uuid,
  value->>'clause_number',
  (value->>'display_order')::int,
  (value->>'clause_level')::int,
  (value->>'customer_position')::numeric,
  (value->>'provider_position')::numeric,
  (value->>'original_customer_position')::numeric,
  (value->>'original_provider_position')::numeric,
  (value->>'ai_suggested_compromise')::numeric,
  (value->>'gap_size')::numeric,
  (value->>'customer_weight')::numeric,
  (value->>'provider_weight')::numeric,
  (value->>'is_deal_breaker_customer')::boolean,
  (value->>'is_deal_breaker_provider')::boolean,
  value->>'clause_content',
  value->>'status',
  (value->>'is_applicable')::boolean,
  (value->>'is_removed')::boolean,
  (value->>'is_locked')::boolean,
  (value->>'selected_by_customer')::boolean,
  value->>'source_type',
  (value->>'source_master_clause_id')::uuid,
  (value->>'created_at')::timestamptz,
  (value->>'updated_at')::timestamptz
FROM jsonb_array_elements($jd${{ JSON.stringify($json.clausePositions) }}$jd$::jsonb);

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "sessionId": "{{ $('Setup & Config').first().json.sessionId }}",
  "playbookId": "{{ $('Setup & Config').first().json.playbookId }}",
  "trainingMode": "{{ $('Setup & Config').first().json.trainingMode }}",
  "clauseCount": {{ $('Build Clause Positions').first().json.clauseCount }},
  "characterName": "{{ $('Setup & Config').first().json.characterName }}",
  "aiPersonality": "{{ $('Setup & Config').first().json.aiPersonality }}"
}
